templates.template: Nutanix Host Prism Element by HTTP
templates.name: Nutanix Host Prism Element by HTTP
templates.description:
Prism Element: It is a service already built into the platform for every Nutanix cluster deployed. It provides the ability to fully configure, manage, and monitor Nutanix clusters running any hypervisors, however, It only manages the cluster it is part of.

This template is designed for the effortless deployment of Nutanix Host Prism Element monitoring and doesn't require any external scripts.

This template can be used in discovery, as well as manually linked to a host - to do so, attach it to the host and manually set the value of the '{$NUTANIX.HOST.UUID}' macro.

More details can be found in the official documentation:
  - on retrieving UUIDs: https://www.nutanixbible.com/19b-cli.html
  - on the Nutanix Prism Element REST API: https://www.nutanix.dev/api_reference/apis/prism_v2.html
  - on differences between Nutanix API versions: https://www.nutanix.dev/api-versions/

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"
templates.readme:
## Overview

This template is designed for the effortless deployment of Nutanix Host Prism Element monitoring and doesn't require any external scripts.

This template can be used in discovery, as well as manually linked to a host - to do so, attach it to the host and manually set the value of the `Host UUID` host wizard configuration field.

More details can be found in the official documentation:
- on retrieving [UUIDs](https://www.nutanixbible.com/19b-cli.html);
- on the [Nutanix Prism Element REST API](https://www.nutanix.dev/api_reference/apis/prism_v2.html);
- on differences between [Nutanix API versions](https://www.nutanix.dev/api-versions/).

## Setup

1. Create a new Nutanix user and add the role "Viewer"
2. Create a new host
3. Link the template to the host created earlier
4. Set the host wizard configuration fields required for getting data:
```text
API IP
API port
```
5. Set the host wizard configuration fields with the login and password of the Nutanix user created earlier:
```text
API username
API password
```
6. Set the host wizard configuration fields with the UUID of the Nutanix Host:
```text
Host UUID
```

items.name: Get alert
items.description: Get data about alerts.

items.name: Get alert check
items.description: Data collection check. Check the latest values for details.

triggers.expression: length(last(/Nutanix Host Prism Element by HTTP/nutanix.host.alert.get.check))>0
triggers.name: Nutanix: Failed to get alert data from the API
triggers.description: Failed to get data from the API. Check the latest values for details.

discovery_rules.name: Alert discovery
discovery_rules.description:
Discovery of all alerts.
Alerts will be grouped by title. For each alert, in addition to the basic information, the number of activation and last alert ID will be available.

item_prototypes.name: Alert [{#ALERT.NAME}]: Count alerts
item_prototypes.description: The number of times this alert was triggered.

item_prototypes.name: Alert [{#ALERT.NAME}]: Create datetime
item_prototypes.description: The alert creation date and time.

item_prototypes.name: Alert [{#ALERT.NAME}]: Detailed message
item_prototypes.description: Detailed information about the current alert.

item_prototypes.name: Alert [{#ALERT.NAME}]: Severity
Alert [{#ALERT.NAME}]: State
Alert [{#ALERT.NAME}]: Full title
item_prototypes.description: The full title of the alert.

item_prototypes.description: The total disk space in bytes.

item_prototypes.name: Disk [{#DISK.SERIAL}]: Space: Free, bytes
item_prototypes.description: The free disk space in bytes.

item_prototypes.name: Disk [{#DISK.SERIAL}]: Bandwidth
item_prototypes.description: Bandwidth of the disk in B/sec.

item_prototypes.name: Disk [{#DISK.SERIAL}]: IOPS
item_prototypes.description: The number of Input/Output operations from the disk.

item_prototypes.name: Disk [{#DISK.SERIAL}]: Space: Logical usage, bytes
item_prototypes.description: The logical used disk space in bytes.

item_prototypes.name: Disk [{#DISK.SERIAL}]: Online
item_prototypes.description: Indicates whether the disk is online.

item_prototypes.name: Disk [{#DISK.SERIAL}]: Status
Disk [{#DISK.SERIAL}]: Space: Used, bytes
item_prototypes.description: The used disk space in bytes.

macros.description: Filter to exclude discovered Nutanix alerts by state. Set "1" for filtering only problem alerts or "0" for resolved ones.

config.label: Alerts filter by state (include)
config.description: Filter to exclude discovered Nutanix alerts by state. Set "1" for filtering only problem alerts or "0" for resolved ones.

config.description: Set the Nutanix API IP here.

macros.description: Set the Nutanix API port here.

config.label: API port
config.description: Set the Nutanix API port here. In the range from 1 to 65535 inclusive.

macros.description: Sets the HTTP proxy value. If this macro is empty, then no proxy is used.

config.label: Proxy
config.description: Sets the HTTP proxy value. If this macro is empty, then no proxy is used.
